# openshift_node_ami (Resource)

Builds a custom RHCOS AMI via Packer with container images pre-pulled. Use the output ami_id in openshift_cluster_aws or openshift_machine_set to roll nodes without touching a registry at boot time. Ideal for airgapped deployments or blue-green node pool upgrades.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `aws_access_key_id` (String, Sensitive) AWS access key ID for Packer to launch the builder instance and register the AMI.
- `aws_secret_access_key` (String, Sensitive) AWS secret access key.
- `ocp_version` (String) OpenShift version, e.g. '4.14'. Used to resolve the correct RHCOS base AMI.
- `pull_secret` (String, Sensitive) Red Hat pull secret JSON. Used to authenticate image pulls during the Packer build.
- `region` (String) AWS region to build and register the AMI in.

### Optional

- `ami_name` (String) Name for the resulting AMI. Defaults to ocp-node-<ocp_version>-<unix_timestamp>.
- `architecture` (String) CPU architecture: x86_64 or aarch64.
- `base_ami` (String) Base RHCOS AMI ID. Auto-resolved from ocp_version + region via openshift-install if not set.
- `extra_packages` (String) Space-separated list of additional RPM packages to install into the AMI.
- `instance_type` (String) EC2 instance type for the Packer builder. Needs enough disk for image pre-pull.
- `packer_binary` (String) Path to the packer binary.
- `registry_url` (String) Mirror registry URL for airgapped builds (e.g. bastion.example.internal:8443). If set, images are pulled from here instead of quay.io.
- `work_dir` (String) Local directory where Packer HCL and SSH keys are written.

### Read-Only

- `ami_id` (String) ID of the resulting AMI. Pass to openshift_cluster_aws or openshift_machine_set.
- `base_ami_resolved` (String) The RHCOS base AMI that was used (resolved or passed in).
- `snapshot_id` (String) EBS snapshot ID backing the AMI. Deleted when the resource is destroyed.
